pairs.question: Who was the head coach of the 1964–65 Princeton Tigers men's basketball team and who was the team captain?
pairs.answer: The head coach was Butch van Breda Kolff, and the team captain was Bill Bradley.

pairs.question: What were the overall and conference records for the 1964–65 Princeton Tigers basketball team?
pairs.answer: The team finished with an overall record of 23–6 and a conference record of 13–1.

pairs.question: How did Bill Bradley perform in the 1965 NCAA Division I men's basketball tournament, and what records did he set?
pairs.answer: Bill Bradley earned the NCAA basketball tournament Most Outstanding Player award. In the tournament, he scored 58 points in a Final Four game against Wichita State, setting NCAA Division I records for single-game points (58) and field goals made (22) in a Final Four contest. He also holds records for two-game points (87) and field goals (34) in a single Final Four year.

pairs.question: What were Bill Bradley's achievements in free throw shooting during the 1964–65 season?
pairs.answer: Bradley led the nation in free throw percentage with an 88.6% mark (273–308). He also held NCAA Division I records for single-game Final Four free throw percentage (93.3%, 14–15) and single-year two-game Final Four free throw percentage (95.0%, 19–20) until these were broken in 1972.

pairs.question: Write a Python function that calculates a basketball player's free throw percentage given the number of made and attempted free throws.
What historical significance does Bill Bradley hold in Ivy League basketball records?
pairs.answer: Bill Bradley holds Ivy League records for single-game points (his 52-point game surpassed a 42-year-old record), single-season average points (28.8 in conference games), and career points. He also holds records for career field goals made, single-season free throws made, and career free throws made. His 1965 career 87.6% free throw percentage was an Ivy League record until 1968.

pairs.question: What notable team records were set by the 1964–65 Princeton Tigers during their Final Four run against Wichita State?
pairs.answer: The team set the current Final Four victory margin record (36 points) and tied the Final Four single-team single-half points scored record (65 points). These performances also formerly held two other Final Four records: single-half two-team points scored (108) and single-year two-game field goals made (78).
